subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath passed round the goblets of guidance in the assembly of the faithful, and given them to drink of the wine of bounty until they were intoxicated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن ادار اقداح الهدی فی محفل اهل الوفاء و سقاهم خمر العطاء فثملوا من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for nearness to God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
